description_long: This is a stout, wooden barrel with a polygonal, slightly bulging body and a flat, closed top. The exterior is reinforced by two thick, metallic bands encircling the upper and lower sections, each adorned with evenly spaced, round rivets. On opposite sides, there are robust, angular metal handles attached to the bands, designed for easy gripping and lifting. The wood surface displays a rich, brown color with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The metallic elements are a dull gray, suggesting durability and resistance to wear. The overall construction implies it is intended for storage or transport of goods in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A sturdy, brown wooden barrel reinforced with gray metal bands and side handles, featuring a closed top and a robust, rustic appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with both metal side handles visible, highlighting the wood grain and the metallic banding.
description_view_1: This view centers on one of the metal handles, showing its angular, robust design and the shadow it casts on the barrel.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, both side handles are visible, but the lighting and angle emphasize the curvature and banding.
description_view_3: The opposite handle is centered, mirroring view 1, with the handle and its shadow clearly visible.
